message:
fix(node): remove ESM type declaration for NAPI-RS compatibility

- Remove "type": "module" that conflicted with NAPI-RS CommonJS output
- Bump @ruvector/node to 0.1.19
- Update optionalDependencies to 0.1.19
- Update hooks to use absolute path to ruvector-cli

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,9 @@
 {
   "name": "@ruvector/node",
-  "version": "0.1.18",
+  "version": "0.1.19",
   "description": "High-performance Rust vector database for Node.js with HNSW indexing and SIMD optimizations",
   "main": "index.js",
   "types": "index.d.ts",
-  "type": "module",
   "napi": {
     "name": "ruvector",
     "triples": {
@@ -80,13 +79,13 @@
     "url": "https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector/issues"
   },
   "optionalDependencies": {
-    "@ruvector/node-win32-x64-msvc": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-darwin-x64": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-linux-x64-gnu": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-darwin-arm64": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-linux-arm64-gnu": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-linux-arm64-musl": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-win32-arm64-msvc": "0.1.17",
-    "@ruvector/node-linux-x64-musl": "0.1.17"
+    "@ruvector/node-win32-x64-msvc": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-darwin-x64": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-linux-x64-gnu": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-darwin-arm64": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-linux-arm64-gnu": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-linux-arm64-musl": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-win32-arm64-msvc": "0.1.19",
+    "@ruvector/node-linux-x64-musl": "0.1.19"
   }
 }
